name: BlueKCCommonNextPageStatusOutboundHistLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT comm.COMM_ID as COMM_ID, comm.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD as COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD as COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_SENT_DTM as COMM_SENT_DTM, comm.COMM_STTUS_CD as COMM_STTUS_CD, comm.LAST_UPDT_DTM as CRT_DTM, comm.COMM_SK as COMM_SK, comm.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX as COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, comm.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT as COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, comm.CRT_USER_ID as CRT_USER_ID, cast(commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM as varchar(50)) as COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] comm LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM_HIST] commhist ON comm.COMM_SK = commhist.COMM_SK AND comm.COMM_SENT_DTM = commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM WHERE comm.COMM_TYP_CD in('MAILRQST','MAILRSPNS','MAILDSPSTN') ) SELECT cte.COMM_ID, cte.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, cte.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, cte.COMM_SENT_DTM, cte.COMM_STTUS_CD, cte.CRT_DTM, cte.COMM_SK, cte.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, cte.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, cte.CRT_USER_ID FROM cte WHERE cte.COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST IS NULL
